(fn diff_by_one s1 string s2 string -> bool
  (set len1 int (len s1))
  (set len2 int (len s2))
  (if (eq len1 len2)
    (set count int 0)
    (for i 0 len1
      (if (ne (string_get s1 i) (string_get s2 i)) (set count (add count 1))))
    (ret (le count 1)))
  (if (eq (abs (sub len1 len2)) 1)
    (set longer string "")
    (set shorter string "")
    (if (gt len1 len2)
      (set longer s1)
      (set shorter s2))
    (else
      (set longer s2)
      (set shorter s1)))
    (for i 0 (len shorter)
      (if (ne (string_get longer i) (string_get shorter i)) (ret false)))
    (ret true))
  (ret false))

  (println "yes")
  (else
    (println "no")))

(set threshold int #1)
(for-each w string words
  (if (gt (len w) threshold)
    (println w)))

(set words array (split $0 " "))
(set threshold int #1)
(for-each w string words
  (if (gt (len w) threshold)
    (println w)))

(set words array (split $0 " "))
(set threshold int #1)
(set found bool false)
(for-each w string words
  (if (and (not found) (gt (len w) threshold))
    (println w)
    (set found true)))
